executives.name: John MacKenzie
executives.background: Mr. MacKenzie has over 30 years of experience in the metals and mining industry. Prior to the business combination of Capstone Mining and Mantos Copper, he was the Executive Chairman of Mantos Copper. He previously served as CEO of Copper for Anglo American.

executives.name: Raman Randhawa
executives.background: Mr. Randhawa is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 20 years of financial experience in the mining industry. He previously served as CFO of Capstone Mining and held senior roles at Goldcorp.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Cashel Meagher
executives.background: Mr. Meagher has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of Hudbay Minerals Inc.

executives.name: Wendy King
executives.background: Ms. King has over 25 years of experience in legal and corporate secretary roles. She previously served as Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Central GoldTrust and Silver Wheaton Corp.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Risk, ESG and General Counsel
Senior Vice President, Risk, ESG, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Jerrold Henniet
executives.background: Mr. Henniet has over 20 years of experience in human resources. He previously held senior HR roles at New Gold Inc. and Goldcorp.

executives.name: Alison Baker
executives.background: Ms. Baker has over 25 years of experience in the provision of audit, capital markets and advisory services. She was previously a partner at PwC and EY.

executives.name: Anne Giardini
executives.background: Ms. Giardini is a lawyer and executive with over 30 years of experience in the resource sector. She was previously President of Weyerhaeuser Company Limited and serves on several boards.

executives.name: Anne Labelle
executives.background: Ms. Labelle is a geologist and lawyer with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in exploration, environmental and legal matters.

executives.name: Bob Gallagher
executives.background: Mr. Gallagher has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the President and CEO of New Gold Inc.

executives.name: George Brack
executives.background: Mr. Brack has over 30 years of experience in the mining investment banking and corporate development sectors. He was previously the Managing Director and Industry Head, Mining at BMO Nesbitt Burns.

executives.name: George Ireland
executives.background: Mr. Ireland has over 40 years of experience in the mining and financial sectors. He is the founder, CEO and CIO of Geologic Resource Partners LLC.

executives.name: Gillian McCombie
executives.background: Ms. McCombie has over 25 years of experience in human resources and corporate operations, previously holding senior roles at various mining companies.

executives.name: Gillian Winckler
executives.background: Ms. Winckler is a former mining executive and investment banker with over 25 years of experience in the metals and mining industry.

executives.name: Kalidas Madhavpeddi
executives.background: Kalidas Madhavpeddi was appointed Chairman in July 2021. He has over 40 years of experience in the international mining industry, including as CEO of China Molybdenum International. He holds degrees from the Indian Institute of Technology and the University of Iowa.

executives.name: Peter Meredith
executives.background: Mr. Meredith has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry and was previously the CFO of Ivanhoe Mines Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: George Ireland
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Ireland has over 40 years of experience in the mining and financial sectors. He is the founder, CEO and CIO of Geologic Resource Partners LLC.

board_of_directors.name: John MacKenzie
board_of_directors.background: CEO of Capstone Copper Corp. with extensive experience in global copper mining operations.
